svg.text: 30 = 2 × 3 × 5, three different primes. Two ways to nest, six ways to order the bottles.

svg.text: 2 nesting shapes × 6 orders = 12 histories, all wearing the single label 30.

svg.text: ℹ log₂ 12 ≈ 3.6 bits hidden by the label “30”
